About AB Consulting Engineers

Welcome to AB Consulting Engineers, a structural engineering consultancy located in Hamilton, Waikato, New Zealand. We offer expert design services for commercial, residential, industrial and infrastructure projects. Our specialization includes structural and seismic assessments, ensuring the highest standards of safety and reliability. Rely on us to expertly manage the complexities of structural engineering through our dedicated consultancy services.

To know more about how we work please go through our Blog - How we work

At AB Consulting Engineers we leverage our international experience and robust local presence to deliver outstanding results. Our dedicated team is unwavering in its commitment to quality, timely delivery, ensuring your needs are met with the highest level of professionalism. Contact us to provide solutions that not only meet but exceed your expectations.

Read our Blog - How to Appoint a Structural Engineer  for more information.

Our Expertise

Explore our range of engineering services designed to address your specific project needs and drive sustainable construction practices

Structural Design - Buildings

Welcome to our Structural Building Design services. We specialize in both new constructions and refurbishments for residential, commercial, industrial and institutional buildings like schools and hospitals. Our experienced team is committed to providing innovative design solutions that align with your requirements. Please contact us to discuss your project in detail.

For more information read our Blog on Retrofit of Buildings  and Prefabricated buildings/Relocatable Buildings

Structural Assessments

AB Consulting Engineers possesses significant expertise in structural assessments, having executed a wide array of projects. We offer a range of services, including

  • Condition assessment of buildings

  • Initial Seismic Assessments (ISA)

  • Detailed Seismic Assessments (DSA).

  • Seismic Strengthening

Rely on us for the safety and integrity of your structures through our evaluations. We are committed to assisting you in making well informed decisions regarding the condition and seismic resilience of your buildings.

For more information read our Blog on the need for Seismic Assessments and Risks with Unreinforced Masonry Buildings

Get in Touch

Civil Engineering

AB Consulting Engineers possess extensive expertise in the design and detailing of a diverse array of civil engineering elements. Our services encompass

  • Pile foundations, including timber, steel , and concrete pile

  • Concrete Pad, Strip and raft foundations.

We are proficient in the design and detailing of Retaining Walls.

We have experience in design of large storage tanks in concrete, precast and steel.

Furthermore, we offer comprehensive design solutions for culverts and manholes, ensuring durable and dependable infrastructure for all projects.

For more information on Retaining Walls, read our Blog on Retaining walls - Which one is right for your property

Trusted Expert

AB Consulting Engineers is a established structural engineering firm dedicated to delivering quality deliverables on all projects. Our successful completion of audits and assessments by respected external organizations underscores our commitment to professional excellence.

Entrusting your project to us ensures that you will receive exceptional service and results. We look forward to transforming your vision into reality with our expertise and reliability.

AB Consulting Engineers qualifications and insurance are vetted by Auckland City Council and are approved producer statement Authors for PS1, PS2 and PS4. Check out our company listing on Auckland City Council website here

 
AB Consulting Engineers are shortlisted and selected by Co-Lab – A  council-controlled organization (CCO) owned by councils across Waikato and Bay of Plenty in to Professional Services Panel as a preferred supplier – Structure and Survey

Read our Blog - Understanding Producer Statements - PS1, PS2, PS3 and PS4 for more information on the need for producer statements and what it means. 

Construction Sectors

Our engineering firm offers a wide range of professional services tailored to meet the unique needs of construction projects. From structural design of simple extensions to  complex infrastructure projects, we provide expert guidance and solutions to help the projects succeed.

Buildings 
 

Our structural design services help projects set clear objectives and create action plans for success. We work closely with clients and other stakeholders to develop customized designs that align with their goals and help in safe and durable structures. We have years of extensive experience in

  • Residential Buildings - Foundations, Portal Frames,  Lintels and Beams which does not fall under NZS 3604, Lateral Stability Calculations. Every building is different and we will work closely with the Architects and home owners to provide a pragmatic and cost effective design solutions to make your dream a reality. Read the Blog to understand when you need to engage a Structural Engineer and what is meant by Restricted Building Work

  • Industrial Buildings - We can assist you in the design of the Portal Frame buildings - Steel and Glulam, Relocatable buildings, Large span sheds and concrete slabs to support heavy machinery. We are committed to providing timely responses and maintaining effective communication with all stakeholders from the outset. Our goal is to deliver on time and meet your expectations with precision. You can rely on us to keep you informed throughout the process, ensuring a seamless and successful collaboration.

  • Commercial Buildings - We are committed to leveraging our extensive experience in the design of multi-storey buildings, apartments, and mixed-use developments in the Middle East. Recognizing the critical importance of construction timelines, we ensure that projects are completed swiftly, enabling our clients to sell or lease their properties earlier which impacts their revenue. Our proficiency in the composite metal deck floors, along with our expertise in steel and concrete construction, allows us to deliver high-quality results efficiently. 

  • Institutional Buildings - We have worked on many projects with the Waikato District Health Board and assessed and strengthened schools in the Waikato and Bay of Plenty region. We have established partnerships with various companies to successfully execute numerous projects in the  educational and healthcare domain. Due to the restricted access and inherent risks associated with these environments, we conduct comprehensive site inspections and provide effective and pragmatic solutions. Our methodology streamlines the process, significantly reducing the effort and time needed for contractors on-site while prioritizing safety and efficiency in the design. 

​

Speak to us regarding your next project or the challenge you are facing. We will be glad to assist you. 

 

​

Structural Assessments

Our assessments are centered on evaluating life safety risks, and we deliver pragmatic, cost-effective solutions for upgrading the buildings to comply with the current standards. We are dedicated to enhancing safety while ensuring that all the improvements are both efficient and financially feasible.

We have extensive experience in the field of Seismic Assessments including Unreinforced Masonry Buildings and have assessed multiple buildings in the Waikato region. We can assist in the following:

  • Initial Seismic Assessments(ISA),

  • Detailed Seismic Assessments(DSA),

  • Condition assessments(age related degradation)

  • Assessment of Civil structures (Foundations, retaining walls and so on)

For more information read our Blog on the need for Seismic Assessments and Risks with Unreinforced Masonry Buildings

Civil & Infrastructure Projects

We specialize in large infrastructure projects, emphasizing effective stakeholder communication for success. Our comprehensive design solutions address complex civil and infrastructure challenges, grounded in solid structural engineering. Partner with us to build a strong foundation for your projects.

We have delivered many projects in Waikato and wider north island in the following fields

  • Large Industrial/ Agriculture Concrete Tanks

  • Retaining walls

  • Swimming Pools

  • Pipes and Manholes

  • Handrails

  • Crash Barriers

Speak to us for further information

Meet Our Engineers

Our team of skilled engineers have a vast international experience, having designed and delivered projects in over 9 countries worldwide. This diverse background enriches our collective expertise and fosters a shared passion for excellence. We leverage our wealth of knowledge and creativity in every project, delivering innovative solutions and exceptional service tailored to our clients' needs.

Avinash Bandaru B.Eng. MSc CPEng CMEngNZ C.Eng.(UK) FIStructE MICE

Managing Director - Structural Engineer

Avinash is a Chartered Professional Engineer with over 22 years of experience in structural engineering, having worked in the UK, Middle East, India. For the past eight years in New Zealand, he has contributed to various projects in Waikato and delivered projects in residential, commercial, Industrial space . He is committed to the  practical and safe designs and focuses on client needs and provides solutions to complex engineering challenges.

Our Partners

Some of the government agencies and private companies who we worked closely in the last year

Recent Projects

Seismic Assessment of Argyle House, Hamilton Boys’ High School
This project involved undertaking a Detailed Seismic Assessment (DSA) of the buildings at Argyle House, Hamilton Boys’ High School. The assessment covered two structures: a two-storey dormitory building and a single-storey kitchen and dining facility. 
All inspections were planned to avoid disturbing the normal functioning of the dormitory which added a lot of value to the client. 

David Lee

Design of Extension to Northgate Community Church
This project involved the structural design and analysis for building an extension to the Northgate Community Church at 97C Borman Road, Hamilton. 
This structure demanded working closely with the Architects and other stakeholders to achieve the large column free space for the community hall. 
We also took initiative to add further value to the project by improving the original concept that allowed minimal disturbances to existing church structure and would also make future extensions easier and more integrated. 
Multiple Projects for Waikato District Health Board
We have been working closely with Waikato District Health Board since 2023 and have provided a wide range of structural Engineering services over the years. Some of the key services include:
1)    Assessment of floor slabs for new openings and machinery
2)    Design for installation and movement of new and/or heavy machinery
3)    Design of tall internal walls and partitions
4)    Design of ceilings and equipment fixings
5)    Design of new decks/extensions for better patient care
During our association, we have always appreciated the importance of even trivial looking aspects and equipment on the smooth functioning of the hospital. Re-routing or disconnecting some services even temporarily have a major impact on the functioning of facility unlike in many traditional buildings. Hence, any structural intervention (if required) is always carefully developed working closely with multiple stakeholders of the hospital to avoid (or minimize if unavoidable) disturbances to the smooth functioning of hospital.
